title: Tanaecium xanthophyllum
intro: Tanaecium xanthophyllum, also known as Yellow-flowered Tanaecium, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Bignoniaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may aid in the management of conditions like fever, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems. The bioactive constituents of Tanaecium xanthophyllum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are believed to be responsible for its medicinal properties. Tanaecium xanthophyllum is often used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly prepared for their supposed health benefits and used in traditional medicine.
